description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Create new release that can be triggered manually. The workflow should have two jobs: version_check and create_release. The version_check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs GitPython, and runs a version check script. The create_release job depends on version_check, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs platformio, generates a version tag, and creates a new release with artifacts using the ncipollo/release-action.
